A.claim: H11-H audited for exact promoted claim and nonclaims.

D.claim: 16-sequence HF-streamed corpus cache exists on phone via native C++ tokenizer path; no host minibatch serving.

E.claim: Heldout top-k KL and predeclared mini metric improved for selected rank-16 residual adapter.

F.claim: QAIRT host env repaired; updateable DLC conversion attempted/succeeded, but valid updateable QNN context and phone applyBinarySection were not achieved.

G.claim: Phone HTP frozen-forward Qwen context executes, but integrated heterogeneous Gemma learning loop is falsified by model/shape/correctness mismatch.

H.claim: Claims are restricted to evidence in this status file; full Gemma4 training, HTP backprop, benchmark readiness, and broad capability remain nonclaims.

nonclaims: Directly marking existing TFLite constants as updateable is falsified for this Qwen block on HTP/CPU context generation.
